description: jackson-jq is a pure Java implementation of the jq JSON query language for Jackson's JSON tree model. It lets JVM applications parse and execute jq filters against Jackson JsonNode values, including built-in functions and optional command-line tooling.

jackson-jq is a pure Java implementation of the jq JSON query language for Jackson's JSON tree model. It lets JVM applications parse and execute jq filters against Jackson JsonNode values, including built-in functions and optional command-line tooling.
